title: PR: INSERT INTO materialized view with JOINS
description:
### Describe the unexpected behaviour
It fails
### How to reproduce
```sql
CREATE TABLE n1 (key UInt64, value String) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY key SETTINGS index_granularity=1;
CREATE TABLE n2 (key UInt64, value Int64) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY key SETTINGS index_granularity=1;
CREATE TABLE n1_n2_join (k UInt64, v1 String, v2 Int64) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY k;
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW mv TO n1_n2_join
AS SELECT n1.key as k, n1.value as v1, n2.value as v2 from n1 JOIN n2 ON n1.key = n2.key ORDER BY n1.key;
INSERT INTO n2 SELECT number, -number FROM numbers(10);
SET enable_parallel_replicas=1, max_parallel_replicas=3, cluster_for_parallel_replicas='test_cluster_one_shard_three_replicas_localhost', parallel_replicas_for_non_replicated_merge_tree=1;
-- this INSERT triggers JOIN in the materialized view, it fails with parallel replicas
INSERT INTO n1 SELECT number as key, toString(key) FROM numbers(10);
```
Fails differently depending on `query_plan_use_logical_join_step` setting
`query_plan_use_logical_join_step` enabled (default)
```
<Error> executeQuery: Code: 10. DB::Exception: Columns [__table2.key] are not found in blocks [__table1.key, __table1.value], [__table1.key, __table1.value, __table2.value]: while pushing to view default.mv. (NOT_FOUND_COLUMN_IN_BLOCK) (version 25.11.1.1) (from 127.0.0.1:48512) (query 1, line 1) (in query: INSERT INTO n1 SELECT number as key, toString(key) FROM numbers(10)), Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):
```
https://pastila.nl/?0014b72b/5b2e8d8e4419354dd733528ed5595dc1#TLOyOR6K7A4rZsY9O8KGYg==
`query_plan_use_logical_join_step` disabled
```
<Error> executeQuery: Code: 1. DB::Exception: JOIN  INNER JOIN ... ON n1.key = n2.key right table expression expected to process query to fetch columns stage. Actual WithMergeableState: while pushing to view default.mv. (UNSUPPORTED_METHOD) (version 25.11.1.1) (from 127.0.0.1:48512) (query 1, line 1) (in query: INSERT INTO n1 SELECT number as key, toString(key) FROM numbers(10) settings query_plan_use_logical_join_step=0), Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):
```
https://pastila.nl/?003d57b9/2e6030b572db02d47a360fff1576fa52#2eJR1gQSm/RxoeLRlv+pew==
### Expected behavior

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE n3 (key BIGINT, value DOUBLE) ENGINE=InnoDB;
CREATE TABLE n1_n2_join (k BIGINT, v1 VARCHAR(255), v2 BIGINT);
CREATE VIEW mv2 AS SELECT n1.key as k, n1.value as v1, n3.value as v2 FROM n1 JOIN n3 ON n1.key = n3.key;

INSERT INTO n3 (key, value) SELECT number, number / 2.0 FROM (SELECT 0 AS number UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9);

INSERT INTO n1 (key, value) SELECT number, CAST(number AS CHAR) FROM (SELECT 0 AS number UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9);
INSERT INTO n2 (key, value) SELECT number, number * 10 FROM (SELECT 0 AS number UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4);
key_bug_features: INSERT triggers JOIN in the materialized view
